userConfig.title: UserConfig
userConfig.description: Messenger and AI config for the client

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user

botActive.description: Is the automatic AI replier active

selectedPersonaId.description: ID of the selected AI persona

customPersonaName.description: Custom AI Persona Name if 6th selected

businessDetails.description: Textual business details for AI context

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.description: An active chat session with a customer via Facebook Messenger

customerPic.description: URL of the Facebook customer profile picture

lastMessageText.description: Content of the last message received or sent

status.description: Status of the conversation: active, archived, etc

isUnderHandover.description: True if human agent has taken control (AI bot is paused for this customer)

users/{userId}/conversations/{psid}.description: Active customer conversations and handover state

users/{userId}/conversations/{psid}/mess.description: Individual messages in a specific conversation
